subject: Ops note: canary deployment schedule for Canberra | Albert Einstein | Q4 review | INIT-4813
body: Here is a progress summary for the canary plan in Canberra. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Albert Einstein is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-4813. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: coordination, coffee.
